overview.description: Sulewadi is a village situated in Malshiras tehsil and located in the Solapur district of Maharashtra, India. It is on the road to Pandharpur. The village has a population of only around 3000. The village people live quietly.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vithal Dayaji Temple, Sulewadi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vithal Dayaji Temple, Sulewadi is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vithal Dayaji Temple, Sulewadi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (131 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (104 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vithal Dayaji Temple, Sulewadi?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vithal Dayaji Temple, Sulewadi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vithal Dayaji Temple, Sulewadi?
faq.a: Stays in Vithal Dayaji Temple, Sulewadi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
